_note: News / share-outs for CECS faculty through the year. Add a new object to the top of 'posts'. 'date' is YYYY-MM-DD. 'body' may contain basic HTML.

posts.title: 2026–2027 committee members selected — every CECS seat is filled
posts.body: Thank you to everyone who volunteered! Our representatives for the open 2026–2027 seats have been selected: Chinwendu Enyioha (Electrical & Computer Engineering) joins the Research Council, Grace Fox (School of Modeling, Simulation & Training) joins the Graduate Policy Committee, Mengxin Zheng (Computer Science) joins the University Travel Awards Committee, Ser Nam Lim (Computer Science) joins the Personnel Committee, and Saleem Sahawneh (Electrical & Computer Engineering) joins the Faculty Center for Teaching and Learning Advisory Committee. See the full roster on the committees page. Seats open up mid-year and again each spring — you can still register interest to be first in line for future vacancies.

posts.title: Committee recruiting for 2026–2027 is open
posts.body: We're recruiting CECS faculty to fill open Faculty Senate committee seats for the 2026–2027 year. Several committees have open seats right now — including the Faculty Center for Teaching and Learning Advisory Committee, Graduate Policy Committee, Personnel Committee, Research Council, and University Travel Awards Committee. Browse the committees and add your name on the volunteer form.
